title: How to Structure Video Transcripts for Answer Engines
excerpt: Learn how to format and structure your video transcripts so that AI systems like Google Gemini and Perplexity can easily extract and cite your answers.
author: Corey Spicer
content:
Transcripts are no longer just for accessibility; they are the raw data that Answer Engines consume. To optimize for AEO, your transcripts must be meticulously structured.

Use Q&A Formats Within Your Videos

Explicitly state the question you are answering in the video audio, and then immediately follow it with a concise, declarative answer. This pattern (Question -> Direct Answer -> Elaboration) makes it easy for AI to parse and recommend your video snippet.
